forecast-period.text: A high pressure system over New South Wales extends a ridge over South Australia. The ridge will ease as the high moves further away into the Tasman Sea this morning. A trough is forecast to move across the western and central waters Tuesday afternoon and evening, pushing across southeastern coasts Wednesday morning. Another high pressure system is expected to become established south of the Bight later next week.
Wind and wave forecasts are averages. Wind gusts can be 40 per cent stronger than the forecast, and stronger still in squalls and thunderstorms. Maximum waves can be twice the forecast height.
For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.
* Calls to 1300 numbers cost around 27.5c incl. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones. Marine forecasts are also available on VHF and HF radio. View the radio schedule on www.bom.gov.au/marine
Check the latest Coastal Waters Forecasts for information on wind, wave and weather conditions for neighbouring coastal zones.
Northerly 10 to 15 knots turning northeasterly in the middle of the day. Winds reaching up to 20 knots south of Cowell to Wallaroo during the afternoon and evening.
Around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Port Neill to Port Victoria by early evening.
South to southwesterly around 1 metre.
Mostly sunny.
Northerly 15 to 20 knots, reaching up to 25 knots near the Yorke Peninsula coast in the early afternoon. Winds turning westerly 10 to 15 knots in the late evening.
1 to 1.5 metres.
South to southwesterly around 1 metre.
Mostly sunny. 50% chance of showers south of Cowell to Wallaroo in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Port Neill to Port Victoria in the evening.
Westerly 15 to 20 knots turning southerly during the day.
1 to 1.5 metres.
South to southwesterly below 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Cowell to Wallaroo.
Mostly sunny.
North to northeasterly 10 to 15 knots decreasing to about 10 knots in the late afternoon.
Below 1 metre.
Southeast to southwesterly below 0.5 metres.
Mostly sunny.
North to northeasterly 15 to 20 knots turning northwesterly 10 to 15 knots in the late evening.
Around 1 metre.
Southeast to southwesterly below 0.5 metres.
Mostly sunny.
Westerly 10 to 15 knots turning southerly during the afternoon.
Below 1 metre.
West to southwesterly below 1 metre.
Mostly sunny. 50% chance of showers.
Northerly 15 to 20 knots turning northeasterly 10 to 15 knots in the evening.
1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to 1 metre by early evening.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2 metres, decreasing to 1.5 metres during the morning.
Mostly sunny.
North to northeasterly 15 to 20 knots, reaching up to 25 knots in the west during the morning. Winds turning west to northwesterly in the afternoon.
1 to 1.5 metres, increasing to 1 to 2 metres in the west during the morning.
Southwesterly 1 to 1.5 metres, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres in the west.
Partly cloudy. 90% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening.
Westerly 15 to 20 knots turning southwesterly below 10 knots during the afternoon.
1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing below 1 metre during the afternoon.
Southwesterly 2 to 3 metres, tending westerly 3 metres during the evening.
Sunny.
Northerly 10 to 15 knots tending northeasterly in the evening.
Around 1 metre.
Southerly 1 to 1.5 metres through the Backstairs Passage, decreasing to around 1 metre during the morning.
Mostly sunny.
North to northeasterly 15 to 20 knots turning west to northwesterly 10 to 15 knots in the evening.
Below 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres during the morning.
Southerly around 1 metre through the Backstairs Passage.
Mostly sunny day. 50% chance of showers in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening.
Westerly 15 to 20 knots shifting south to southeasterly below 10 knots during the evening.
1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to 1 metre during the morning.
West to southwesterly below 1 metre, increasing to 1.5 to 2.5 metres during the afternoon or evening.
Mostly sunny. 50% chance of showers.
